caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" is seated in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He is speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, the walls are adorned with various framed pictures, and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt stands to his right. Racks of clothing and a black chair are also visible in the background. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular logo on the left containing the text "PODCAST" and a red logo on the right with the text "BULLY". Throughout the clip, the man continues to speak and gestures with his hands, while the background and camera angle remain constant.
